title: Property Consultant - Godrej Properties - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Godrej Properties - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!
